title: XML parsers should not be vulnerable to XXE attacks
description: This rule checks for XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities in XML parsers, which can lead to server-side request forgery, data exposure, and denial of service attacks.
recommendation: Use a safer XML parser or configure the current XML parser to prevent XXE attacks.

noncompliant.description: Parsing XML with a vulnerable XML parser.

compliant.description: Parsing XML with a safer XML parser.

why_is_this_an_issue: XXE attacks can lead to sensitive data exposure and server-side request forgery.
how_to_fix: Use a safer XML parser that does not allow DTD processing or configuration of the current XML parser to disable DTD processing.
